settings._comment: Set 'cert' to the public domain or IP that staff devices will reach. For an IP-only deploy you can use the IP, but a real domain + Let's Encrypt is strongly recommended.
settings._sessionKeyComment: Generate a long random string once and keep it secret. e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`

domains.title: Company Remote Support
domains._newAccountsComment: Keep this false so randoms can't sign up. Create staff/admin accounts yourself.
domains._consentComment: Consent is enforced per Device Group in the web UI (see README step 5). These domain defaults make notifications visible across the org.

letsencrypt._comment: Uncomment and set your email + names to get a free trusted certificate automatically. Requires port 80 reachable from the internet.
